description: This file provides functions for generating initial role recommendations based on a persona, including fallback mechanisms, scoring, and reranking logic. It interacts with external services like bedrockService and scoringEngine, and exports functions for both Bedrock-driven and fallback-only recommendation generation.

methods.name: _clampPercent
methods.description: Clamps a number to the 0-100 range, returning 0 for non-finite inputs.

methods.name: _buildRingScores
methods.description: Builds UI-friendly ring scores (mastery and growth) from report data.

methods.name: _threeTwoValidationScore
methods.description: Returns 100 if the report is validated, otherwise 0.

methods.name: _rerankByThreeTwoAndCompatibility
methods.description: Sorts roles prioritizing fallback, validation, and compatibility scores.

methods.name: _extractPersonaSkillsWithProficiency
methods.description: Extracts proficiency-bearing skills from a persona object, only accepting numeric proficiency values.

methods.name: _normalizeRoleForInitialRecommendations
methods.description: Normalizes role data for initial recommendations, including required skills and salary range.

methods.name: _dedupeByRoleTitle
methods.description: Removes duplicate roles based on lowercased role titles.

methods.name: _markFallback
methods.description: Marks a role as fallback-filled with a reason.

methods.name: _markNonFallback
methods.description: Marks a role as not fallback-filled.

methods.name: _padToExactlyFiveRoles
methods.description: Pads a list of roles to exactly five using a deterministic fallback catalog, avoiding duplicates.

methods.name: _scoreRoles
methods.description: Scores roles based on persona proficiency, including fallback mode when proficiency data is missing.

methods.name: generateInitialRecommendationsPersonaDrivenBedrockOnly
methods.description: Generates role recommendations using Bedrock, with retries and padding to meet minimum count, including scoring and reranking.

methods.name: generateInitialRecommendationsFallbackOnly
methods.description: Generates role recommendations solely from a deterministic fallback catalog, used when Bedrock is unavailable or disabled.
